name: Curried Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1 Apple, peeled, cored and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Slice the eggs and place them in a double layer, slightly overlapping, in a greased baking dish. Set aside.
3. To make the sauce: Melt butter in a pan over low heat. Add apple and onion. Cook, stirring until the onion is limp and the apple has reduced to a puree (10 minutes).
4. Stir in curry powder, then flour and salt. Stir until smooth.
5. Slowly add milk, stirring continuously. Cook, stirring until the sauce is thick and smooth.
6. Pour the sauce over the eggs and place the dish in the oven.
7. Bake until bubbly and hot. Top with parsley.
8. Serve with chutney.
